---
name: Bug report
about: Report a bug observed in the Glamornate backend or deployed app
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Description
What is the bug?

## Surface
Which API surface is affected? (e.g. specific callable, HTTP route, Firestore rule, Storage rule)

## To Reproduce
Steps:
1. ...
2. ...

## Expected behavior
What you expected.

## Actual behavior
What actually happened. Include error code if returned (e.g. `unauthenticated`, `permission-denied`).

## Environment
- Where reproduced: production / emulator / local Firebase suite
- Backend version (if known): [e.g. v0.1.0]

## Additional context
Logs, request IDs, or other context.
